violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
Establishment was observed with vacuum sealed raw unseasoned chicken without a HACCP Plan. Chicken removed from packaging at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

Crab Rangoon mix (made on site) was observed with a date mark exceeding 7 days. Foods made on site must be used within 7 days of prep date. Person in charge voluntarily disposed of food at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation pink residue. The non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned as often as necessary. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

The floorsin the dry storage area and next to the mop sink has an accumulation of old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024
Various items were observed with a date mark exceeding 7-days. PIC voluntarily disposed of items at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine observed with biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

The floors in the dry storage rooms and under the racks of equipment observed with old rodent droppings. Physical facilities must be cleaned as often as necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves throughout kitchen have an accumulation of dust, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2023
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2023

The floors throughout the kitchen under/behind equipment have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris and/or rodent droppings The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2023
